summary: Frontend e2e testing of newly added UI flows in Clinique+: admin invoice creation, accountant invoice creation/encaisser/PDF, admin appointment edit/cancel, pharmacist stock-lot form, nurse blood-pouch form, and regression check for 'En développement' placeholders. All 6 flows passed end-to-end against the live preview backend.
critical_code_review_comments: FactureForm.js – montant_total is computed client-side and posted; backend should ideally recompute the total from items to prevent client tampering. Not a blocker but a security note.
AppointmentsList.js – cancelAppointment fires immediately without a confirmation prompt (no window.confirm/dialog). UX could be improved by asking the user before deleting/cancelling.

PharmacienStocksPage.js & InfirmiereBloodBankPage.js – quantite default starts at 0 with type=number; if a user clears and submits empty, browser validation may not fire because 0 passes required. Consider min=1 on quantity inputs.
FactureForm.js – patient <option> only displays numero_dossier; for usability it would help to also show patient nom/prenom.
ComptableFacturesList.js – 'Encaisser' immediately posts a payment with method 'espèces' and no confirmation/method picker. Acceptable for MVP but flagged.
seed_data_creation: Created during test run: 1 admin facture (Consultation cardiologie TEST 2x15000 = 30000 FCFA), 1 comptable facture (Bilan sanguin TEST 1x8000 FCFA), 1 cancelled appointment (id e37e6c41-9175-440c-9efd-8d4b880d8561), 1 pharmacy stock lot (LOT-TEST-<timestamp>, 50 units), 1 blood pouch (POCHE-TEST-<timestamp>, O+, 500ml), and 1 encaissement on an existing facture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All five new UI submit flows are wired end-to-end and confirmed working against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Detailed evidence: admin invoice total computed=30,000 FCFA and POST returned redirect to /admin/billing; admin appointment cancel for id e37e6c41 removed the cancel button (status became annulé); comptable encaisser flipped row badge to 'payée'; PDF export opened a new tab calling window.print() with no JS error; pharmacist stock rows went 16→17 and the new lot number was present in the DOM; nurse poche form closed on success and O+ summary card showed 5 poches / 2300 ml. No 'En développement' placeholder text found on any of the 24 role pages scanned (admin x8, médecin x4, infirmière x4, pharmacien x4, comptable x3). No pageerror or console error captured during the run.
